title: Skill Eval Suite
description: Test case definitions and assertions for evaluating a Claude Code skill.

skill_name.description: Slash-command name of the skill being evaluated, without plugin namespace.

plugin.description: Plugin namespace for skill invocation. If omitted, auto-detected from plugin.json.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test case. Stable across runs.

prompt.description: The user prompt sent to the skill.

expected_output.description: Human-readable description of what good output looks like.

files.description: Paths to fixture files, relative to the evals.json directory.

assertions.description: Assertions graded by the LLM judge after each run.
